terms.definition: A standard-library module of lazy, composable iterator building blocks (chain, islice, groupby, accumulate, combinatorics, etc.).
A standard-library module of higher-order function tools (lru_cache, partial, reduce, wraps, cached_property).
A functools decorator that memoizes a function's return values keyed by its arguments, evicting least-recently-used entries past maxsize.
A functools tool that returns a new callable with some of a function's arguments pre-filled.
A functools function that folds an iterable into a single value by repeatedly applying a two-argument function.
An itertools function that iterates over several iterables in sequence as if they were one.
